//: Config do Claude Code para projetos scaffolded. Merge no .claude/settings.json existente via install (Install-JsonBaselineItem). Caveat: Merge-JsonObject SUBSTITUI arrays — se voce mantem hooks proprios aqui, eles serao sobrescritos no -Update. O command e' uma dispatch-line portavel (J4): com pwsh roda o .ps1; sem pwsh, cai p/ o .sh (degradacao consciente).

hooks.command: sh -c 'if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec pwsh -NoProfile -File "$1"; else exec bash "$2"; fi' _ "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/curation-nudge.ps1" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/curation-nudge.sh"

sh -c 'if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec pwsh -NoProfile -File "$1"; else exec bash "$2"; fi' _ "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/peer-heartbeat.ps1" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/peer-heartbeat.sh"

sh -c 'if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec pwsh -NoProfile -File "$1"; else exec bash "$2"; fi' _ "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/curation-nudge.ps1" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/curation-nudge.sh"

sh -c 'if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec pwsh -NoProfile -File "$1"; else exec bash "$2"; fi' _ "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/peer-heartbeat.ps1" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/peer-heartbeat.sh"

sh -c 'if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec pwsh -NoProfile -File "$1"; else exec bash "$2"; fi' _ "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/agent-graph-context.ps1" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/agent-graph-context.sh"
